Notice Of Deft. City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Compel Plntf'S Discovery Responses And To Deem Admitted Matters, And Request For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Corinna E. Meissner for defendant and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Paul Steiner for plaintiff and opposing party: Ronald L. Fishman

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification:
1) defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories set #1, request for production of documents, and request for statement of damages
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order.

2) defendant's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted: DENIED.
Monetary sanctions in the amount of $836.30 payable by November 22, 2005.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
